title: "applyAgenticMemoryRecordAdmissions()"
description: "Applies agentic memory record admissions."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Applies agentic memory record admissions.

## Import

```ts
import { applyAgenticMemoryRecordAdmissions } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function applyAgenticMemoryRecordAdmissions(
	admissions: unknown,
	policy: unknown,
	opts: AgenticMemoryRecordApplicationOptions<T> = {},
): AgenticMemoryRecordApplicationSnapshot<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `admissions` | `unknown` | admissions value used by the helper. |
| `policy` | `unknown` | Application policy for applying admitted record material. |
| `opts` | `AgenticMemoryRecordApplicationOptions<T>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The apply agentic memory record admissions result.

## Example

```ts
import { applyAgenticMemoryRecordAdmissions } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/agentic-memory";
```

`packages/ts/src/solutions/agentic-memory/record-application.ts`
